architectural_constraint: GKE Autopilot only. Minimal resource sizing for testing. Workload Identity for all auth -- no service account keys. Cloud-agnostic abstractions where practical. Terraform must pass validate and plan without errors.
acceptance_criteria: terraform validate passes on all modules
terraform plan produces expected resource counts
All IAM bindings use Workload Identity Federation
Vertex AI endpoint supports traffic splitting
Namespaces: owner, manager, employee with ResourceQuotas on employee
No service account keys or secrets in any file
